title: BatchUpdateSpreadsheetRequest
description: The request for updating any aspect of a spreadsheet.

requests.description: A list of updates to apply to the spreadsheet.

includeSpreadsheetInResponse.description: Determines if the update response should include the spreadsheet resource.

responseRanges.description: Limits the ranges included in the response spreadsheet.

responseIncludeGridData.description: True if grid data should be returned.
